faqs.question: Which courses does Meenakshi Ramasamy Arts and Science College offer?
faqs.answer: Meenakshi Ramasamy Arts and Science College provides programmes including M.A, M.Phil, M.Sc, MBA/PGDM, M.Com, Ph.D, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, BBA, BCA in streams such as Humanities & Social Sciences, Business & Management Studies, Science, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Hospitality & Travel, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Beauty & Fitness, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Design, Teaching & Education, Mass Communication & Media, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Electronics, Mathematics, Microbiology, Physics, English, Bioinformatics, Travel & Tourism Management, Food Production, Visual Communication.

faqs.question: How can I get into Imperial Institute of Advanced Management for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Imperial Institute of Advanced Management has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
MBA/PGDM Candidates must have passed Bachelor's degree of minimum of 3 years duration examination or equivalent and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates). Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Imperial Institute of Advanced Management?
faqs.answer: Imperial Institute of Advanced Management offers Degree courses including 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Imperial Institute of Advanced Management has specializations such as MBA/PGDM specializations in Sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college and great future.

review_content.Placements: 95 percent of student were placed in my course In my course (Diploma), the highest package was INR 6 lacs pa and the average was INR 3 lacs pa. Many students got internships from my college. Talking about the Medical Diploma Course, 95 percent of students got internships from my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities and infrastructure available for my course, like wi-fi, labs, libraries, medical labs, and machines for practical work. In my hostel, there are many rooms, and the separate room has AC, toilets, a fan and other room facilities. And the quality of food is also good .

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Gnit College of Management is one such college where students learn a lot of new things.

review_content.Placements: HR analytics Finance manager Business development executive Digital marketing course The top recruiting companies are HCL, COCO COLA, Amazon, Flipkart etc. 80% students got placement by college placement deive. The faculty members of placement are so supportive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is so good. They maintain hygeine while preparing food. You can join different clubs like dance club, singing club, sports club. They organise sports meet also. The students of GNIT college of management also participate on national level.

description: S. D. College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about S. D. College of Engineering and Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The S. D. College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the S. D. College of Engineering and Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 249145 and 1413411 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Civil

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 249145 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 517591 in 2023.

S. D. College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to S. D. College of Engineering and Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

hostel_campus.college_name: S. D. College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel facilities include internet and wi-fi connection, 24 hours power backup, indoor games etc

library.description: Fully automated central library comprises of e-journals and e-books
Fully automated central library comprises of e-journals and e-books

hostel.description: Hostel facilities include internet and wi-fi connection, 24 hours power backup, indoor games etc

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a library for students. Sports and games facilities are very good. There is a ground for sports. A skating area and shooting area are separately made for the students. Very good.

reviews.review_heading: Muzaffarnagar, The worst engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Very bad infrastructure. The college doesn't have proper drinking arrangements. You can imagine how worse this is. The government should shut down such types of colleges. They also commit scholarship fraud with students. They don't have basic materials like cement in the civil labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious with well-ventilated systems and equipped with digital projectors for presentation. A huge library is available for students. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. Food delivery is available.

reviews.review_heading: You can join our college to get better placements and have a successful future.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms were huge and well-ventilated. There was also a huge library with all the latest books. The canteen and mess facilities were also good. They served a variety of tasty food items at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is quite good. The college campus is not that big, but it works. We have many computer labs with free Wi-Fi and well-furnished classrooms. The cafeteria provides good quality food, and the hostel mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who want to do UG living nearby college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well and facilities are average. Hostel facilities are average. Canteen and mess is good but no sport and games facilities are present basically the college is more like school. The college is good for the local students whom resites nearby college in muzaffarnagar city.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of the facilities provided in the college and teachers also.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms here are moderate, and there is no Wi-Fi facility. The librarian doesn't allow students to study in the library, and labs are not up to the mark. It is not a residential college, so there are no hostels. There are no medical facilities, sports and games. The canteen is available here only for namesake. Director is the worst in this college, and the head of the college doesn't know anything about the course. So, you can't expect anything.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in studies, but average in other activities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. Facilities provided by the college is good. There is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus, labs and classroom are good, the library is not too good. Hostel facilities are average, and there are 24 hours of water and electricity in the hostel. Mess food is good, and cleaning facility is also average.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms are great enough to accommodate almost 60 students. The floor has tile, and the walls are painted well.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure in this college is good, and the rest is bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was more than good. Classrooms were clean and well-maintained. Till 2013, the college hasn't provided any Wi-Fi facility. The library was very good, and books related to all courses were available. If a particular book were not available, the librarian would make it available in the given time. All the equipment was available for course-related experiments, and the equipment functioned well and was well-maintained. But there were no sports and games related area...

reviews.review_heading: The college with a hygienic infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: When I have attended my first lecture at the college, I was amazed at the simple but beautiful and hygienic infrastructure. The labs are good and equipped with all necessary technology. The classrooms are average with the traditional environment.  The smart and digital methods are not provided. The canteen is not that good. The classrooms are equipped with bulbs which is disappointing.

reviews.review_heading: I had both good and bad experiences here.
reviews.review_text: The college looks attractive, but the classrooms aren't well-equipped with modern technologies. Labs in the computer science department are fine. The library is renovated recently, and I must say it is a great place. Extracurricular activities are conducted every alternative weekend, but the low participation from students disappoints our college management.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: There are many classrooms available in our college. Some are air-conditioned, and some classrooms are equipped with projectors. There is separate administration block available on the campus. There are separate conference rooms available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am moderately satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Labs are well-equipped, and the other facilities like library and canteen are also good as well. The college has well-designed infrastructure when compared with other colleges in the same region. The campus is huge and well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I just want to say it is a great college in Muzaffarnagar.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very beautiful infrastructure. When I entered my college, I was very happy after seeing the infrastructure of my college. I was very happy after getting admission in S D College of Engineering and Technology. It was a golden time of my life in this college.

college_info.intro: SDGI Global University offers various Undergraduate and Postgraduate courses in the field of Engineering, Law, Management, etc. SDGI Global University courses are MBA, BBA, BTech, etc. SDGI Global University course admission is based on entrance exam, namely SGUET. Candidates need to qualify for the eligibility criteria before applying for the courses at SDGI Global University. Check out the below information to know about SDGI Global University courses and fees:

placements.overview: The placement cell of the SDGI Global University is committed to providing students with training and professional opportunities throughout their academic careers. The placement cell maintains contact with various industry sources, organises on-campus training and recruitment and informs the students about placement opportunities. SDGI Global University offers 100% placement assistance. The highest package offered during SDGI Global University placements 2024 was INR 20 LPA. Top companies visit SDGI Global University placements such as TCS, Accenture, Revature, TESA, VVDN, and companies such as Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, and Genpact, among others.

faqs.answer: A:    The top recruiters at SDGI Global University are TCS, Accenture, Revature, TESA, VVDN, InnoBit, Brawn, Infosys, Cognizant, Square Yards, Siemens, Radisson, MAQ Software, Wipro, Godrej, HCL, Capgemini, Aculife, Barbeque Nation, Oberoi, Uber, Hyatt, Tech Mahindra, Escorts, Turning Minds, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, they are like friends.

review_content.Placements: As a BBA student, the overall placement is good, as companies like TCS, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, and many more are there. In my course, the highest package is 8.3 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Around 70% of students get placed who are interested and pass the interview. Roles are offered in HR, sales, and marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available on the campus, like the library, Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, canteen, hostel, mandir, and restrooms, which are also very clean. Hostel rooms are quite good with two people sharing. The mess food is delicious. There is a hospital, so no worries about medical issues. Sports functions happen every year, and students also participate with other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is good. Its infrastructure is also well organised and nice.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is minimum 50 percent. The highest package that has been offered in our course is maximum upto 12 LPA. The average package is 8 LPA. The lowest package is upto 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, HCL, Google, etc. The percentage of students got internships is upto 50%.The percentage of students got internships is upto 50%.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities that are provided by our college such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, AC-furnished classrooms with LED smart tv, library, cafeteria, basketball grounds, cricket grounds, medical services, hostels, mess, etc. The quality of everything is good.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total fee for various courses at SDGI Global University?
overview_faqs.answer: SDGI Global University offers various UG and PG courses. The total fee vary from course to course for all the programmes. Find below the course-wise fee for some of the SDGI Global University programmes:Course NameFeesBTechINR 8 lakhMBAINR 1.5 lakh BScINR 1.2 Lacs - INR 6 lakhBBAINR 2.1 Lacs - INR 5.2 lakhBDesINR 4 lakh

overview_faqs.question: Is SDGI Global University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: SDGI Global University was established in 2023 by Sunder Deep Group of Institutions. SGU's vision is to become a centre of excellence for professional education across various fields. SGU offers a wide range of Undergraduate and Postgraduate programs in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Management, Hotel Management, Pharmacy, etc. SDGI Global University campus is well-equipped with classrooms, laboratories, libraries, hostels, and sports complex.

overview_faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MBA course in SDGI Global University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SGU Ghaziabad MBA programme is INR 1.5 lakh. Further, the total course fee includes various other components as well. Candidates can get in touch with the university officials to get details about the fee structure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of BBA at SDGI Global University?
overview_faqs.answer: There are multiple components added to the total course. The total tuition fee for BBA at SGU is INR 2.10 lakh. This fee is calculated based on the first-year fee. Hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: SDGI Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, they are like friends.

content.Placements: As a BBA student, the overall placement is good, as companies like TCS, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, and many more are there. In my course, the highest package is 8.3 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Around 70% of students get placed who are interested and pass the interview. Roles are offered in HR, sales, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available on the campus, like the library, Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, canteen, hostel, mandir, and restrooms, which are also very clean. Hostel rooms are quite good with two people sharing. The mess food is delicious. There is a hospital, so no worries about medical issues. Sports functions happen every year, and students also participate with other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is good. Its infrastructure is also well organised and nice.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is minimum 50 percent. The highest package that has been offered in our course is maximum upto 12 LPA. The average package is 8 LPA. The lowest package is upto 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, HCL, Google, etc. The percentage of students got internships is upto 50%.The percentage of students got internships is upto 50%.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities that are provided by our college such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, AC-furnished classrooms with LED smart tv, library, cafeteria, basketball grounds, cricket grounds, medical services, hostels, mess, etc. The quality of everything is good.

admission_overview.college_name: SDGI Global University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: SDGI Global University, Ghaziabad admission 2025 isentrance based. The institution selects candidates for admission based on their entrance exam scores. Students can pursue programmes at the institution at UG and PG levels. The admission process of theSDGI Global University, Ghaziabadmainly commences online. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process of the SDGI Global University, Ghaziabad.
SDGI Global University Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

SDGI Global University admissions start by evaluating the basic eligibility criteria for the programme. Candidates must meet the minimum educational requirements of their desired courses at the time of admission. Tabulated below is the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria forSDGI Global University course admission 2025:
Know more aboutSDGI Global University courses

Admission to SDGI Global University is done through a multi-level admission process. Candidates must go through each step to secure admission to the university's UG or PG level courses. Find below the step-wise details around SDGI Global University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

The application process for SDGI Global University is completely online. Candidates can visit the university's online admission portal and fill the application form for their desired UG or PG programme.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

SDGI Global University admissions are completely based on the university-level SDGI Global University Admission Test. The test is conducted by the university for admission to all its programmes. Students who score well on the admission test will be able to proceed with the admission process.
Step 3: Release of Merit List
After the result declaration of the admission test, the university releases the merit list of the selected students on the university's official website.
Step 4: Counselling Process & Document Verification
Candidates whose names appeared in the merit list are called to attend counselling process. During the counselling round, students are asked to verify their original documents.
Step 5: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
At last, the selected students must pay a certain amount of course fee to confirm their seat as perSDGI Global University fee structure.

faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SGU Ghaziabad MBA programme is INR 1.5 lakh. Further, the total course fee includes various other components as well. Candidates can get in touch with the university officials to get details about the fee structure.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MBA course in SDGI Global University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SGU Ghaziabad MBA programme is INR 1.5 lakh. Further, the total course fee includes various other components as well. Candidates can get in touch with the university officials to get details about the fee structure.

faqs.question: Which MBA course is offered by SDGI Global University?
faqs.answer: SDGI Global University is offering MBA in Hotel Management. It is a two-year course, which is divided into semester pattern. Admission to the PG course is entrance-based.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to SDGI Global University?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not valid to SDGI Global University. Admission to all the UG and PG courses of the university is entirely based on entrance exam score. The university conducts SDGI Global University Entrance Exam to select the right candidates. The exam is common for all the UG and PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission at SDGI Global University?
faqs.answer: Tabulated below is the SGU Ghaziabad courses along with the eligibility details:CourseEligibility CriteriaBTechPass Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregate from a recognised universityMBAPass UG degree with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised universityBScPass Class 12 with obtaining minimum score of 45-50% aggregateBBAClass 12 with minimum 45% aggregate is requiredBDesPass Class 12 from a recognised boardMCAAny UG degree preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 or at Graduation level obtained with obtaining minimum 50% marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying examination

faqs.question: What are the stages of SDGI Global University admission process?
faqs.answer: The step-by-step process for SGU Ghaziabad course admissions is as follows:STEP 1:The first step is that the aspirant check whether he/she meets the eligibility requirements or not. If a candidate is found to be eligible at any stage of the admission procedure, then the university holds the right to cancel admission in such a case.STEP 2:Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria need to appear for the SGUET Entrance Test. Admission to the offered courses is based on this exam score. SGUET application form can be submitted via both online and offline modes.STEP 3: Candidates who took the exam arefurther invited by the university to schedule an appointment with the admission counsellors and visit the campus. At the time of this procedure, students will be informed about the campus and then can be asked to pay some amount of fee for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: What is the accepted exam for admission at SDGI Global University?
faqs.answer: SGU Ghaziabad admit students to the offered programmes based on merit in SGUET Entrance Test. This entrance exam is conducted by the university itself. The application form for this examination can be accessed via both online and offline modes.

review_content.Placements: I suggest you do not opt for MBA in tourism course because all you will not be able to fulfil your dreams. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. The minimum salary offered was Rs. 4,000 per month, but it's not valuable to do this course. Marks don't matter in college, and you have to get ready to work in a low salary as the faculty members also advice the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are no useful books in the library. College is in outside of the city, which is 20 kilometres away from the market. You will only get a southern taste food, but it is delicious in the beginning. After a while, you'll get bored with the food and quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Tourism and Travel - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty and facilities that they provide.

review_content.Placements: They are more than 200 students in our institute. They are many top recruiting companies that are giving offers to our institute like Yatra, Kesari Tours, Cox and Kings, etc. Most of our college students got internships from our course in many companies like Yatra, Kesari Tours, and Airlines. Once you joined in tourism, you should stop thinking about the salary. Tourism is a kind of passion. Placements are good. But never expect big salary packages. So we concentrate on knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, common room, benches, air-conditioners, fans, vehicle facility, generator, gym area for both girls and boys, canteen for chilling out with friends, washing rooms, and all facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Tourism and Travel - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to pursue BBA course in Nellore.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placements majorly in tourism companies. The college is under central government institutions and has good value for its certificate.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, and a good mess. The environment on the campus is very good, and this college is located in Golagamudi village, which is near Golagamudi Venakayya Swami Temple. It is surrounded with greenery all around and has fields besides. The campus has a good breeze, and the village atmosphere gives better oxygen.

review_summary.college_name: Indian Institute of Tourism and Travel Management,Nellore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Tourism and Travel Management - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It has the worst placement cell.

content.Placements: I suggest you do not opt for MBA in tourism course because all you will not be able to fulfil your dreams. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. The minimum salary offered was Rs. 4,000 per month, but it's not valuable to do this course. Marks don't matter in college, and you have to get ready to work in a low salary as the faculty members also advice the same.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are no useful books in the library. College is in outside of the city, which is 20 kilometres away from the market. You will only get a southern taste food, but it is delicious in the beginning. After a while, you'll get bored with the food and quality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Tourism and Travel - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty and facilities that they provide.

content.Placements: They are more than 200 students in our institute. They are many top recruiting companies that are giving offers to our institute like Yatra, Kesari Tours, Cox and Kings, etc. Most of our college students got internships from our course in many companies like Yatra, Kesari Tours, and Airlines. Once you joined in tourism, you should stop thinking about the salary. Tourism is a kind of passion. Placements are good. But never expect big salary packages. So we concentrate on knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, common room, benches, air-conditioners, fans, vehicle facility, generator, gym area for both girls and boys, canteen for chilling out with friends, washing rooms, and all facilities.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Tourism and Travel - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to pursue BBA course in Nellore.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements majorly in tourism companies. The college is under central government institutions and has good value for its certificate.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, and a good mess. The environment on the campus is very good, and this college is located in Golagamudi village, which is near Golagamudi Venakayya Swami Temple. It is surrounded with greenery all around and has fields besides. The campus has a good breeze, and the village atmosphere gives better oxygen.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Jayam College of Engineering and Technology has an impressive review rating of 2.97 by 13 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Jayam College of Engineering and Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Jayam College of Engineering and Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The Jayam College of Engineering and Technology course fee ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Jayam College: a student's opinion.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered is INR 6 lpa, the lowest package is INR 2.2 lpa, and the average package is INR 3.2 lpa for the mechanical engineering department. There is a very active placement cell to invite more recruiters, and all clear students are placed in the best companies. If you have extraordinary communication skills, you can also be placed in the best company. Top roles are quality engineer, production engineer, and management for the mechanical department. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Royal Enfield. And the placement percentage is above 80 percent; if you clear all engineering subjects, you can also get placed at the best company with a good salary package.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Experience at Jayam college.

review_content.Placements: In my opinion, the placement is good and the salary package is average for the mechanical engineering department compared to other departments like computer science and information technology. The average package is INR 2.2 LPA for the mechanical engineering department, and the mechanical students are also placed in IT companies. They are providing the best placement training to us, and the placement percentage is also high. All the students are placed, and the internships are available only during semester holidays.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but the hostel facilities are very good from my point of view, like the hostel rooms and water facilities, the food provided to the hostellers, and the Wi-Fi available on our campus. They are giving more importance to sports. So, they give students a separate hour to play sports and games and maintain the physical activity of students. There is a well-stocked library present, and the classrooms are very neat and large, with 60 seats, and the projector is provided for every single class room. Mess and canteen food is acceptable, a variety of foods are presented, and the foods are hygienic.

description: What's new at Jayam College of Engineering and Technology cut off 2023? TNEA Rank List 2023 is out. To check and download the rank list, candidates must visit the official website of TNEA 2023 at tneaonline.org and login with the username and password. TNEA rank list is also available in the form of PDF. Check TNEA Rank List, here. In case of any queries or grievances regarding the rank, candidates may contact the nearby TNEA Facilitation Center (TFC) on or before Jun 30 (4 PM). Check, the list of TFCs, here. Further, the Online General Counselling for Academic, Govt. School 7.5% category and Vocational candidates is to be held between Jul 7 and Aug 24. More insights on Jayam College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2023 are mentioned below:

TNEA Rank List 2023 has been released on Jun 26 on the official website of TNEA 2023 at tneaonline.org. To check and download the rank list, candidates must log in with their username and password. The TNEA rank list is also available in the form of a PDF. In case of any queries or grievances regarding the rank, candidates may contact the nearby TNEA Facilitation Center (TFC) on or before Jun 30 (4 PM).

Jayam College of Engineering and Technology accepts TNEA scores, followed by TNEA counselling 2023 for admission to the BE/ BTech courses. TNEA cutoff 2023 will be available here as soon the data will be released on the official website. reviews.review_heading: Jayam College of Engineering and Technology is absolutely a good college .
reviews.review_text: Jayam College of Engineering and Technology is located in an eco-friendly place. This college has UG and PG courses. More laboratory facilities are available in this college. Gym facilities are also here at this college. This college hostel facility was excellent. Hostel foods and canteen foods are good. Some sports grounds facilities are also here at this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was excellent. Our campus was eco-friendly. Many laboratories were available. Computer laboratory was excellent. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Separate hostels were available for boys and girls. The food served in the hostel was good.

reviews.review_heading: Jayam College: a student's opinion.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best, as are the hostel facilities, and the labs are good and in working condition. In the computer labs, very basic computers are used. But, for educational purposes, that is enough, and the internet connection is available on the whole campus, but only in labs and staffrooms. All the books are presented in the library department books, and as well as other books, the medical facilities are not much more extensive. But a first aid kit is available, the food presented in the me...

reviews.review_heading: Experience at Jayam college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but the hostel facilities are very good from my point of view, like the hostel rooms and water facilities, the food provided to the hostellers, and the Wi-Fi available on our campus. They are giving more importance to sports. So, they give students a separate hour to play sports and games and maintain the physical activity of students. There is a well-stocked library present, and the classrooms are very neat and large, with 60 seats, and the projector is provided for ever...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jayam College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: In my opinion, the hostel and infrastructure are good, and the food available in the canteen and mess is very good, both quality-wise and quantity-wise. There are very neat and clean classrooms, and every break hour, the classrooms are cleaned. The internet connection is available on campus but is used only in labs and staffrooms. The water facilities are very good; all types of water are available, like hot and cold water. The medical facilities are like a first aid kit. They have more sports a...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jayam College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure. Internet connection is available for labs and staff members. There is a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are the best. The quality and quantity of food are acceptable. Some medical facilities like first aid kits are provided. They provide importance to sports and games, so they provide one hour to sports daily. The mess and canteen are neat and clean. Labs are the best for our mechanical engineering course. Don't face any issues in the hostel as we...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jayam College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. The hostel rooms are good. They provide Wi-Fi as well as study materials. The hostel facilities are good. The quality and the quantity of food are acceptable. The food in the canteen is good. They dedicate separate hours to physical activities like yoga and sports. Wi-Fi is only available to staff members and labs. They host sporting events. Our classrooms are well-kept and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with their useless rules and politics. Even they banned mobiles for 1st year students.
reviews.review_text:
The college has a big campus with less infrastructure even drinking water is supplied through cans and have toilets far from classes
This irritated more
The hotel is not that good but fair 
Food in mess is fair for hostel fees
Food is available in the canteen in less not much on the menu. Labs are good but not maintained well. A lot of labs are available
The computers in the lab are not that good, very slow and old.
The library is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied of management.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure was good, Very big construction area.
Departments were separated and the building were huge.
No Wi-Fi in the college.
Labs were there with respective departments.
Classrooms with fans, and green boards.
Library was fantastic but no Wi-Fi.
Hostel was there and food was good.

reviews.review_heading: There are average placement facilities, good infrastructure and good environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped labs with the latest machinery and the latest software. The computers present in the labs have Wi-Fi connectivity. Classrooms are good with projectors. We have a common library for the whole college with 10,000 books, and there is a Wi-Fi zone with 100 computers, where people can surf the internet to gain knowledge. Our special college clinic & an ambulance are present. Our college has good outdoor & indoor sports grounds and stadium including open ground, basketbal...

reviews.review_heading: About Jayam College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good. It is a very spacious college. The ground is clean and neat. All kinds of sports are here and need little improvements. They are providing the lunch also. The boys and girls separate hostels are available. The transport facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has nice infrastructure and we can enjoy the college life.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is free. Natural air is available in the classrooms Automobile lab, thermo dynamic lab, electrical devices control lab, and the aeronautical lab is available in the college. The medical facilities are provided to the students. The sports events were conducted every month. Separately they arranged hostel facilities for boy and girls. The food available in the hostel and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Surely a disappointment to those who want to join here. If you like food, then maybe can consider
reviews.review_text: All the labs are facilitated with good pieces of equipment as a lab should be but that is not going to teach us the real struggle that we are going to face after the college. The library looks big but isn't worth as it is being projected. The hostel is good. Compared to other colleges, the food here is good. For classrooms and infrastructure- I would rate 2.5/10.

Jayam College of Engineering and Technology is situated at Dharmapuri, a district in Tamilnadu. There is a problem we usually face i.e. after mid night we will find it difficult to get a bus from Dharmapuri to Nallanur where, the college is situated. There are certain faculty members who are very talented while some are not. The college management is very strict in terms of fee. Some of my seniors were unable to attend the university examination as they failed to pay some part of the fees about ... reviews.review_heading: Jayam College of Engineering and Technology is absolutely the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Jayam College of Engineering and Technology has a good infrastructure. Well-equipped laboratories and library facilities are available in this college. In college, classroom facilities are very good. This college provides good hostel facilities for both boys and girls. Hostel rooms are daily maintained in good condition. Hostel food is very hygienic. Some sports grounds facilities are also available in this college.

college_info.college_name: Neelkanth Group of Institutions

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Neelkanth Group of Institutions:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good in our college because faculty members work hard.

review_content.Placements: The placements of Neelkanth college are very good. My senior batch has 40 students and all the students are placed in top MNCs like Wipro, TCS, HCL, etc. The highest salary package offered is 9.12 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5.75 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.52 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has sprawling hostels for boys. These hostels include air-conditioned rooms as well. The hostel rooms are adequately ventilated and well maintained. Adequate security arrangements have also been made with its operation overseen by an on-site head of the institution. Comfortable and spacious rooms. The modern and hygienic kitchen serves nutritious and healthy food. There is 24x7 security, Wi-Fi connectivity with round-the-clock internet facility, a standby power generator that provides a non-stop water supply, medical attention, general items kiosk, playgrounds, and a gymnasium in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good studies, but placement offers are not reachable to students.

review_content.Placements: Almost 10% of the students are placed in our college in local computer science companies. The salary packages offered range from 1 LPA to 2 LPA. Local companies visit the campus to hire students from the computer science stream. No student got an internship from any course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college area is about 20 acres and inside we have a beautiful cricket ground. Our college building is four-storied and the condition of the classrooms is very good. Each classroom is 20 feet in length and breadth. We also have a polytechnic college building on our campus which is also a four-storied building.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

Every college prefers to follow an individual coursework module that includes both theory classes and practical lab work. While core subjects and fundamental concepts might be similar, the structure, electives offered, and laboratory and project work are different.You can check the detailed syllabus for the course on the respective college websites that you're targeting to get a clearer picture.

overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing Execut

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Neelkanth Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a good campus and provides average placements for students.

content.Placements: A few of my friends were placed in average companies. They worked there for one year. This institute provides average placements where students should gain experience and improve their communication skills so they can achieve more success in their lives.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided the best facilities, like good libraries. The canteen had all the necessary items. The mess food was average in taste and quality. Overall, the college iwa good in terms of facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers were always helpful in every situation involving our studies and other problems. They taught students very well and took extra classes for weak students at exam time or before exams. They always complete their courses on time and also revise the syllabus in brief when it's possible and clear our doubts very well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college lacks a good faculty.

content.Placements: The overall placement scenario in the college is average. For B.Tech CSE, the placements are not very amazing. The average package offered in my course is 3 lakhs per annum. The college maintains proper discipline with rules and regulations.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Hostel food is not good and the hostel warden is not very friendly with students. The food quality in the mess is also not up to the mark.
content.Faculty: The faculty of the college is not so great. Teachers lack proper knowledge about any programming language. They only provide theoretical knowledge and no practical knowledge is provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in our college because faculty members work hard.

content.Placements: The placements of Neelkanth college are very good. My senior batch has 40 students and all the students are placed in top MNCs like Wipro, TCS, HCL, etc. The highest salary package offered is 9.12 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5.75 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.52 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has sprawling hostels for boys. These hostels include air-conditioned rooms as well. The hostel rooms are adequately ventilated and well maintained. Adequate security arrangements have also been made with its operation overseen by an on-site head of the institution. Comfortable and spacious rooms. The modern and hygienic kitchen serves nutritious and healthy food. There is 24x7 security, Wi-Fi connectivity with round-the-clock internet facility, a standby power generator that provides a non-stop water supply, medical attention, general items kiosk, playgrounds, and a gymnasium in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good studies, but placement offers are not reachable to students.

content.Placements: Almost 10% of the students are placed in our college in local computer science companies. The salary packages offered range from 1 LPA to 2 LPA. Local companies visit the campus to hire students from the computer science stream. No student got an internship from any course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college area is about 20 acres and inside we have a beautiful cricket ground. Our college building is four-storied and the condition of the classrooms is very good. Each classroom is 20 feet in length and breadth. We also have a polytechnic college building on our campus which is also a four-storied building.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with college in Meerut, and 95% of the students get campus placements.

content.Placements: The highest academics percentage secured by the students is 90%, and the minimum is 60%. Most of students secured above 75% of marks in their academics. The highest salary package of the college is 13 LPA and the minimum salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Tech Mahindra Ltd, Genpact, Ashoka Leyland, Just Dial, Optra Automation, etc. Our college offers B.tech, Diploma, BBA and BCA courses.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are very good with 24x7 lights and water. The campus is lush green. The canteen is huge, and they serve fresh food. Medical facilities and an ambulance are available here in case of emergency. Sports classes are also held on our campus, and especially cricket ground is huge where every year tournaments are held.

admission_process.title: Neelkanth Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Neelkanth Group of Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Neelkanth Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.Ed, B.A. B.Ed, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 81,000 - 2,44,800. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BBA at Neelkanth Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BBA programme at Neelkanth Group of Institutions is merit-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their Class 12 marks. There is no entrance examination required. Students who meet the minimum percentage criteria will be notified by the institute regarding further admission steps.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because I learned many things which will be very useful in future.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many good facilities. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled.  The college has almost 100 classrooms. There are different libraries for different departments. Our college has a large sports ground, and all the sports facilities are provided. Quality of food served in the canteen is good with reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are 3 buildings for different courses, and the college also has a playground, an assembly ground and a shaded hall. The cafeteria is very good, and there is a hostel on the campus, so it is easy to come to the college for students who reside in the hostel.

Sports and another activity also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: With no doubt, it's one of the good colleges in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Good and green type of infrastructure is present, and you will never get bored while going to this college. A perfect library, full Wi-Fi connectivity, an enjoyable canteen, all sports facilities are available. Labs are excellent with all equipment and machines for all branches and has skilled assistants.

reviews.review_heading: Extremely happy with college, very good infrastructure and very good teaching methods.
reviews.review_text: The Neelkanth College has a smart classroom for the modern way of teaching. There are fully air-conditioned classrooms. There is an availability of LCD projectors in each classroom. The systemised way of teaching is done. Use of right-tech an up to date technologies, extremely rich and properly managed library with audio-visual facilities. 24*7 Wi-Fi facility and well-equipped computer labs are available. Grooming facilities, communication labs, seminar halls, conference rooms, sports room, and ...

reviews.review_heading: satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi labs, classroom, library medical facility, sport and game, etc. are available in my college. The cricket academy integrated by Virendra Sehwag and many international cricketers visited my college like Mine Ali. Good quality of lab and classrooms. Good quality food is available in the canteen. The hostel rooms are better.

reviews.review_heading: Neelkanth Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure includes a very well groomed library, and fully Wi-Fi enabled campus. There is 24*7 ambulance service. A great playground which consists of a cricket ground, basketball court, badminton court, two volleyball courts and one kabaddi ground are available. The canteen is not an attraction, while the mess and hostel are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: A review that helps you for higher education.
reviews.review_text: We can say that a good infrastructure is also important for a good college. A student wants fantasy, education and a better environment, we can say it is a bit necessary for all the students. The infrastructure of the college was pretty impressive, and the playgrounds were fine as it was top maintained in the city. It has all types of courts like badminton, basketball, throw ball, etc. There is a huge library, well-maintained labs, free Wi-Fi also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Neelkanth Institute of Technology (NIT)
reviews.review_text:
Well-maintained library and computer labs. In our classrooms, there is a projector for studying. We used to watch corporate videos. 
There is also small hut shaped canteen but they provide good food.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Adesh University?

faqs.answer: A:    Adesh University in Bathinda, Punjab, offers MBBS with a first-year fee of INR 15.5 Lakhs. Private medical colleges in India are generally expensive with fees varying significantly .Therefore, while Adesh University's MBBS programme is relatively costly, it is in line with the expenses of typical private medical colleges in India.
faqs.question: Is Adesh University very expensive for MBBS?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year.This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. The fee for NRI students is $1,25,000 for the whole course.The university has a total of 150 seats for MBBS, with 68 open merit seats,  37 scheduled caste seats,  15 backward classes seats,  7 physically handicapped/orthopedically handicapped seats, and 3 migrants from Jammu & Kashmir due to terrorist violence seatsThe fee for NRI students is $44,000 for the whole course.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBBS at Adesh University?

faqs.answer: A:    There are a total of 425 seats in the BSc course at Adesh University. The candidates are primarily shortlisted based on their merit in the most recent qualifying examination and selected for admission to this course based on the number of seats sanctioned and filled. However, the mentioned number of seat is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How many seats are there at Adesh University for BSc?

faqs.answer: A:    Along with the fees for a BSc course at Adesh University, students must know that there might be some extra one-time charges as well. These can include application fees, a security deposit, and miscellaneous fees. However, the Adesh University BSc course fee ranges from INR 1.6 Lacs to INR 3.5 lakh. It must be noted that the above-mentioned fee is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college with good placements and extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Placements depend on students' hard work. Our seniors got 77th rank all over India and one went to America to DDS. Its facility is very helpful and students should start their clinics but there are high opportunities to work which helps students to get many jobs. The practical work is very good in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. The hostel fee for both boys and girls is Rs. 90,000. The hostel facility for girls is much better than for boys. overview_faqs.answer: The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year.This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. review_summary.college_name: Adesh University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In short, I say this college infrastructure is good. The faculty is also helpful to students.

content.Placements: Almost all students were placed in different fields. The highest package went to about Rs. 50,000. Companies that offered jobs like Cipla, Mankind, etc. Roles offered in our course were Clinical Pharmacist, Clinical Researcher, Academic Professions, and Hospital Pharmacist as well.
content.Infrastructure: There were well-cleaned washrooms, classrooms, and the hospital, all maintained well. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus of the university and hospital. Facilities in the hostel included coolers and a well-functioning air conditioning system. The quality of food in the mess and canteen was excellent. Medical facilities were available across the campus. Sports and games were also provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I love my college in every way.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure, including well-furnished labs, a library, and classrooms with Wi-Fi. We do all our work on computers because our college has good partnerships with companies that provide computers. We are very thankful for that.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is very good in our college because teachers are knowledgeable and well-educated. Semester exams are not very tough but average, as teachers sometimes provide help with papers. The pass percentage is 35% in each exam.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college with good placements and extracurricular activities.

Its facility is very helpful and students should start their clinics but there are high opportunities to work which helps students to get many jobs. The practical work is very good in this college.

The girls' hostel food is excellent than the boys' hostel. The menu is good. The night menu is not good. It depends on students to manage the evening food. The food quality is not good. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive review about my college .

content.Placements: The total seats for BDS are 100. Our batch consisted of 70 students. The course fee is 1.65 lacs plus a 10 percent increment every year. The internship is compulsory at the same college. The top roles offered are comprehensive clinical research projects, continuing dental education programs, and clinical experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. We'll maintain lecture halls as well as clinic areas and departments. The library includes books on all subjects and authors. Free Wi-Fi in both hostels and colleges. The hostel has three room types: double, triple, and single. Food is good, as is the canteen attached. All kinds of spots are performed.

admission_overview.title: Adesh University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Adesh University admissions 2025 are both entrance and merit-based. Adesh University offers courses in various fields, such as Management, Science, Commerce, Arts, Law, and more. It offers the UG courses via its affiliated colleges, and the admissions are based on merit scores of the last qualifying exams. Whereas, the PG courses are offered at the university's campus and its affiliated colleges. For the remaining courses, the university conducts an in-house entrance exam.

paragraphs: Adesh University seat intakevaries as per the course and specialisation selected by the students. To secure a seat at the university students must participate in the counselling.Adesh University seatsvary for both on-campus and affiliated colleges. Students can check out the following table to learn about the total seat intake for some of the popular Adesh University Dharwad courses:

The admission procedure for Adesh University involves multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, application, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission must fulfil all of the required admission criteria before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailedAdesh University admissions process:
Step 1: Adesh University Application Process 2025

Adesh University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Adesh University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online, and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Adesh University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams, such as NEET, for the selection of respective courses.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds for the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

placement_data.title: Adesh University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Adesh University has not released the placement report or brochure. As per the Shiksha student's reviews, around 50% of the batch was placed in the recent placement drives. The lowest package and highest package offered were INR 1.05 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. Further, the average package for Adesh University placements in the past few years was between INR 2.2 LPA and INR 3 LPA . Dr. Morpen, Abbot, and Max Hospital were some of the leading companies that hired the students over the past years.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Adesh University?
faqs.answer: The University has not released the official placement report. However, some of the students have mentioned the placement details on Shiksha students' reviews, which are as follows: Particulars Placement Statistics Placement rate Around 50% Lowest package INR 1.05 LPA Average package INR 2.20 LPA - INR 3 LPA Highest package INR 5 LPA NOTE: The above placement details are gathered from the Shiksha students' reviews.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Adesh University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Adesh University in 2022 was 4- 5 lpa. Adesh University, Bathinda has a placement cell that interacts with recruitment companies and sends them an annexure. The placements for the senior batch are quite impressive, with almost all students being placed. The university offers placement details, including the average and highest salary package, top companies, and percentage of batch placed. The university also has a Training and Placement Officer who works in consultation with the Coordinator Industry-Institute.

faqs.question: Who were the recruiters at the Adesh University placements 2023?
faqs.answer: The recruiters at the Adesh University placements 2023 are: Fortis hospital Cipla Apollo Novartis And many others recurring from Punjab and other sectors

It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBBS at Adesh University?
faqs.answer: The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year. This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. The fee for NRI students is $1,25,000 for the whole course. The university has a total of 150 seats for MBBS , with 68 open merit seats, 37 scheduled caste seats, 15 backward classes seats, 7 physically handicapped/orthopedically handicapped seats, and 3 migrants from Jammu & Kashmir due to terrorist violence seats The fee for NRI students is $44,000 for the whole course.

faqs.question: Is Adesh University very expensive for MBBS?
faqs.answer: Adesh University in Bathinda, Punjab, offers MBBS with a first-year fee of INR 15.5 Lakhs. Private medical colleges in India are generally expensive with fees varying significantly .Therefore, while Adesh University's MBBS programme is relatively costly, it is in line with the expenses of typical private medical colleges in India.

description: Adesh University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Adesh University NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 700268 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Adesh University BDS cutoff 2025 was 700268 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 617674 for admission to the BDS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

For BDS admission, the last round cutoff rank was 485492 for the students belonging to the General home state quota. In 2024, the closing cutoff for the same course was 173114._x000D_

The cutoff list was released based on the NEET PG rank, choice declared, availability of seats in college and course, and reservation factors. For MDS admission, the last round closing ranks varied between 2657 and 4463 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. facilities: MBA - Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university

reviews.review_heading: In short, I say this college infrastructure is good. The faculty is also helpful to students.
reviews.review_text: There were well-cleaned washrooms, classrooms, and the hospital, all maintained well. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus of the university and hospital. Facilities in the hostel included coolers and a well-functioning air conditioning system. The quality of food in the mess and canteen was excellent. Medical facilities were available across the campus. Sports and games were also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: I love my college in every way.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure, including well-furnished labs, a library, and classrooms with Wi-Fi. We do all our work on computers because our college has good partnerships with companies that provide computers. We are very thankful for that.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with good placements and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. The hostel fee for both boys and girls is Rs. 90,000. The hostel facility for girls is much better than for boys. The girls' hostel food is excellent than the boys' hostel. The menu is good. The night menu is not good. It depends on students to manage the evening food. The food quality is not good. Air conditioners include additional charges of Rs. 90,000 in sharing. Each student should pay Rs. 45,000.

reviews.review_heading: Radiology in Adesh University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure that was provided is good. The classrooms were fully digitalized, and the labs were good for practical purposes. The hostel and mess were acceptable, though not that great.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review about my college .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We'll maintain lecture halls as well as clinic areas and departments. The library includes books on all subjects and authors. Free Wi-Fi in both hostels and colleges. The hostel has three room types: double, triple, and single. Food is good, as is the canteen  attached. All kinds of spots are performed.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: Adesh University has very good infrastructure and facilities for this course. Laboratories are available for student practice. The college provides Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, classrooms, sports, facilities, etc. Hostel and other necessary facilities are also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Adesh University.
reviews.review_text: On the university campus, there are six colleges. Our college provides good infrastructure. The campus is huge. The university only offers medical-related courses. A lab is available. There is a central library. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, but you get bored with the food. The hostel fee is a bit over the top.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is safe, but the infrastructure is not so great. You have to pay for everything, like the AC, fridge, geyser, and kettle, and pay the electricity bill of the hostel. No free laundry is there. The food is hygienic and tasty, but you will probably get bored with the same menu.

reviews.review_heading: This college is affordable for middle-class students with good teachers and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: We have normal classrooms with fans. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are not air-conditioned. There is no ventilation in the basement. Library is very good. Hostel facilities are average. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are not free for students. Cricket is only played.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable college with good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were normal with Wi-Fi facilities. The library was good. Our college provided drinking water and hygienic atmosphere. The hostel facilities were average but the quality of food was nice. New recipes were served daily. Medical facilities were available for students at affordable rates.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of well-qualified and knowledgeable faculty.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are not good because the gym is available only for MBBS students. The college has facilities like
a library, labs, playground, gym, auditorium, parking area etc. The hostel quality is good. Food quality is the best in the canteen, just feel like home. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: College of my dreams as I am satisfied with the faculty, good infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: 24/7 Wi-Fi, library, all medical facilities available, canteen, different departments, and AC lecture theatres. A very nice environment is provided to the students in our college. As there are various facilities available for us like library, canteen, nearby hostels, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are awesome. The infrastructure of our college is good. For our course, it is really good enough. Everything is going smoothly, and every rising day becomes awesome here. Tournaments are organised every year. The mess is good for better health. Medical facilities and staff are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Adesh University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my course is good. Facilities like labs, classrooms, etc., are available. The hostel infrastructure is good. Computers with Wi-Fi are available in the labs. The chemicals are also present to do experiments freely. The library is well maintained for the peaceful study of students. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are the best for students, and they don't face any difficulty.

reviews.review_heading: The best medical university in india.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The college provides Wi-Fi facility and medical facility. The lab is quite spacious and well maintained with basic facilities like - sports, live cricket, basketball, badminton, kabaddi and football can be played on the campus. There are separate room for indoor games like chess, carrom, table tennis. The hostel room are quite spacious.

data.description: Yes, Adesh University follows a semester pattern in its BSc course. The academic year is divided into two semesters of six months each, and students take a group of courses per semester. The university provides different specialisations for the BSc with a three- four-year course duration. The course is divided into six to eight semesters. The system provides educational standards and opens up avenues for further education.

college_info.college_name: ICRI Dehradun: Courses, Admissions 2025, Fees, Placements, Cut Off, Ranking

highlights.summary: Admissions are open to all courses for the academic year 2023. Interested candidates can apply by visiting the official college website.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The mode of ICRI Dehradun admission is online. Admission to various courses is based on entrance exam/ written test followed by GD and PI rounds. At the UG level, the college offers three-year BSc and BBA courses to the students. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MSc and MBA courses. The college offers five-year PhD courses and also provides PG diploma courses to the students. MSc is offered in two specialisations and MBA in three specialisations. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by ICRI Dehradun and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    ICRI Dehradun offers MBA in four specializations. Each of it has a seat intake of 30 seats. The total seat intake for the MBA program at ICRI Dehradun is 120 seats. Candidates can apply with a valid MAT, CAT, or CMAT score. The minimum score for MAT is 80 percentile. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a group discussion and personal interview. Also, Candidates must have a bachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% marks. Applicants must be graduates or post-graduates in life sciences, microbiology, biotechnology, pharmacy, medicine, nursing, physical therapy, dentistry, or other fields.
faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA at ICRI Dehradun?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, ICRI Dehradun accepts Management Admission Test scores for admission to its management programs. For admission to its management programs, ICRI Dehradun accepts marks from CBSE 12 exams in addition to the Management Admission Test (MAT). The eligibility criteria differs from course to course at ICRI Dehradun.
faqs.question: Does ICRI Dehradun accept MAT score?

faqs.answer: A:    ICRI Dehradun has the following course fees for different programs:MBA: INR 1.4 Lakhs (1st Year Fees)BBA: INR 90,000 (1st Year Fees)BA {Hons.}: INR 2.1 Lakhs (Total Fees)B.Sc: INR 70,000 (1st Year Fees)M.Sc: INR 1.4 Lakhs (1st Year Fees)Ph.D: INR 4.2 Lakhs (Total Fees)
