faqs.answer: As per latest information, the application forms for ICRI Dehradun are generally released between March and May, and the admission process can continue until the start of the academic session. The admission process for the Institute of Clinical Research, Dehradun is conducted online, and the last date for submitting the online application form is typically announced on the official website. ICRI Dehradun is still accepting applications for the MBBS program. Registration for ICRI Dehradun NEET (Phase-2) will end on October 13. A division of the first institute for clinical research and healthcare in India, ICRI, is the Institution of Clinical Research India Dehradun (ICRI Dehradun - Himgiri Zee University).
faqs.question: Q: When is ICRI Dehradun application forms out?

faqs.answer: Yes, there are chances that you can join ICRI Dehradun directly by applying for admission to its various programs. ICRI Dehradun offers various courses in clinical research, healthcare, and management. Students can also apply for an educational loan online through ICRI - DIT University. Some of the courses do not calls for any competitive examinations. It is advised to check the official website for detailed eligibility criterias of various courses.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join ICRI Dehradun directly?

faqs.answer: Applicants should have passed Class 12 from a recognised board to be considered eligible for ICRI Dehradun's BSc program. There is no mention of any minimum percentage, but applicants are required to clear the entrance examination and PI for selection.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc admission at ICRI Dehradun in 2025?

faqs.answer: Yes, ICRI Dehradun is considered a good institution for pursuing an MBA as it offers new-age postgraduate programs at premium Indian and global institutions, focusing on futuristic industries and preparing students for the job market. It has also partnered with renowned schools and institutions in India, providing students with access to a global alumnus and a pan-India presence. Talking of the infrastructure, the ICRI campus is modern, well-equipped, and offers a safe and comfortable atmosphere for students. It provides accommodation for both boys and girls, along with amenities such as a departmental snack shop and a bookstore.

admission_overview.college_name: ICRI Dehradun Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Fees & Last Dates

paragraphs: ICRI Dehradun admissions2025are primarily entrance-based. The institute conducts an entrance exam for admission.ICRI Dehradunoffers UG, PG and doctoral courses in collaboration withAjeenkya DY Patil University. The courses are offered in multiple streams such as Management, Science, Arts, etc. Interested candidates can fill out the quick query form, followed by the application form, to apply for admission. ICRI Dehradun offers full-time BSc and BBA in various specialisations at the UG level. The institute provides MSc, MBA and PG Diploma at the PG level in different specialisations. For research scholars, a PhD is awarded by the institute. The admission process for UG programmes is followed by a Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI) conducted by ICRI. Admission into the MBA programme is based on the scores ofCAT/MAT/CMATor an equivalent entrance exam.

ICRI Dehradun offers admission to courses based on their performance in the entrance exam. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Candidates must complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below areICRI Dehradun coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Note:The official website does not mention course-specific criteria. Hence, generic selection criteria are taken.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Maheshwari Girls P.G. College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Maheshwari Girls P.G. College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Humanities & Social Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Maheshwari Girls P.G. College offers MBA/PGDM, M.Com and M.A. The fees for Maheshwari Girls P.G. College courses range between INR 28,300 to 1,17,300.

faqs.answer: A:    Maheshwari Girls P.G. College is a well-known institution for BBA, M.Com, M.A, MBA/PGDM, B.Com, B.Sc, B.A. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Maheshwari Girls P.G. College has course specializations in English, Human Resources, Biology, Mathematics.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I have had very good experience in this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in this college are average because there is umbrella placement of Sinhgad campuses. It is a disadvantage to sit for pool placements even if the companies visiting in more number. Placement facilities are available for only professional courses. The college is supporting their students for every process. As per my knowledge, the average package of the students in professional courses is 15 LPA. Almost every student gets placement with a good package and my course is Bachelor in Technology. I hope I get a good salary placement as my college is very supportive.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is quite recommendable.

review_content.Placements: Placement quality is great in this college; the percentage of placement in our batch was 70%. The highest salary package was 11 LPA and the average package was 4 LPA. The placement process was easy and smooth. College, as a placement cell, gives every kind of support to students for jobs. It ensures better placement for all students with a lot of good companies and well-rounded packages are offered. Moreover, a placement of 95–98% is guaranteed and helps you groom your aptitude and verbal knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Colleges have great infrastructure. Every facility is available, like hostels, libraries, and Wi-Fi smartboards. Every facility is used regularly and well maintained. Living spaces are also clean and food is hygienic. The class has AC and the learning is done via e-learning using projectors, organizing projects and extra curriculum on a frequent basis, and connecting with great motivational speakers and high achievers.

overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing Execut

overview_faqs.answer: Maheshwari Girls P.G. College is a renowned institution offering BBA, M.Com, M.A, MBA/PGDM, B.Com, B.Sc, B.A. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Maheshwari Girls P.G. College boasts an impressive review rating of 4.1 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.5 for Campus Life, 3.83 for Placements, 4.33 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Maheshwari Girls P.G. College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A nice, friendly environment.

content.Placements: Many girls come and study in this college. In my college, there are many students who got good jobs in multinational companies. Companies like Infosys and many more visited the college. Some students can't get placements, but the college is good for studying.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and safe for girls. In our college, Wi-Fi, labs, and good classrooms are available. The computer lab is awesome. I didn't face any issues in my college. The library contains many useful books. The food quality is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I love my college with its affordable fee range. I and every student are happy at college.

content.Placements: Almost 30–35% of students get a very good package according to their studies and knowledge level on campus. The rest of them get a very decent package at their knowledge level. The highest package is 11 LPA, and the lowest is around 4-5 lakh p. a. Top recruitment companies are Deloitte, LIC, HDFC Bank, and BIG4s. Almost 50% of students get internships. Our college offers an MBA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college offers lab activities every day, in which they teach us every possible thing, which makes our knowledge stronger, and course-related assignments. They provide us with free Wi-Fi, classes are airy, and every class has two CCTVs. The quality of food in our canteen is very tasty, delicious, and very affordable. Medical facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I have had very good experience in this college.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are average because there is umbrella placement of Sinhgad campuses. It is a disadvantage to sit for pool placements even if the companies visiting in more number. Placement facilities are available for only professional courses. The college is supporting their students for every process. As per my knowledge, the average package of the students in professional courses is 15 LPA. Almost every student gets placement with a good package and my course is Bachelor in Technology. I hope I get a good salary placement as my college is very supportive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is quite recommendable.

content.Placements: Placement quality is great in this college; the percentage of placement in our batch was 70%. The highest salary package was 11 LPA and the average package was 4 LPA. The placement process was easy and smooth. College, as a placement cell, gives every kind of support to students for jobs. It ensures better placement for all students with a lot of good companies and well-rounded packages are offered. Moreover, a placement of 95–98% is guaranteed and helps you groom your aptitude and verbal knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Colleges have great infrastructure. Every facility is available, like hostels, libraries, and Wi-Fi smartboards. Every facility is used regularly and well maintained. Living spaces are also clean and food is hygienic. The class has AC and the learning is done via e-learning using projectors, organizing projects and extra curriculum on a frequent basis, and connecting with great motivational speakers and high achievers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I got a very good experience.

content.Placements: Since our college has provided very good placement until now,. Most of the students are placed in very good companies. This year, the average package for my college is 4.5 LPA. The company which visited this year were Infosys, Wipro, Mahindra, etc. As observed and heard by the other people out and about, Maheshwari College has a good placement. After completing the graduation, the college contributes their part to the students' placements in companies that offer good salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: All the necessary facilities and equipment as a facility include a good sports center and hostel facilities for both boys and girls. All these facilities are well maintained, the living spaces are clean and the food is also hygienic in the cafeterias. The college has all the necessary infrastructure and facilities, like laboratories, sports centres, hostels, and smart classes. My college campus is clean, hygienic and well maintained. It has lots of trees so it is greenish and pleasant to study. The campus layout encourages interaction and collaboration, fostering a sense of community among students. It was my best choice in life to choose this college.

overview_faqs.question: Is Dr. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Dr. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Dr. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering has a rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.5 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good campus with friendly staff.

content.Placements: It is really good college. Compared to before as of now the college is also supporting and providing a placement cell. More than 50 students were placed. The average salary is 3.5 LPA. There are many courses like CSE, ISE, EC, and EEE.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel residential is good. The nature around is also good and fine. There is no disturbance. It is located far away from the city. Food is good. Rooms and washrooms are fine. But there is no hot water facility as of now but it will be provided soon. Power circulation is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculties are totally good.

content.Placements: Placements are not good in this college as they provide very low packages like 2-3 lakhs per annum. You have to do an internship outside. I don't guess the college will provide an internship, but they are trying very hard to develop colleges and provide the best packages to students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are not so good. People who can't pay more can join this college. Teaching is good, but the college needs to improve a lot. The hostel fees are more for what they provide. Mess food is okay. If you have health issues, the best way is to go for pg or make your own rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Nice college and best placements.

content.Placements: Around 59% of students are placed in top IT companies. The highest salary package offered was 2 LPA for our seniors, and the lowest offered was 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Information, and more. Top roles are testing and development. Many internships are held.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college were good compared to other universities in Bangalore. Wi-Fi is on campus and equipped labs with all facilities. We have library cards to access the books; we have more number of books. The food is good, and the college is the best.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am happy with this college.

content.Placements: The percent of students who were placed in our course is 85 percent. The highest package is INR 21 lacs per annum, the lowest package is INR 4 lakhs per annum, and the average package is INR 8 lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies, such as IBM, Microsoft, Zoho, KPMG, and more, visit the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the course is relevant. Facilities available for courses are the lab, cupboards, classroom, and library. The college has a nice environment. I don't know about hostels, but the canteen food is good and they provide medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with a good study environment.

content.Placements: The placement record is good. About 70% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Infosys, Tata, IBM, Indian Railways, etc., come here.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities in our college are good. There are 2-sharing rooms. It has a good environment for study. Wi-Fi is available, both 5G and 4G. Labs are good. The library is good with lots of books. Classrooms are attractive.

admission_process.title: Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theDr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineeringapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Engineering and Business and Management Studies, and more. To know about the eligibility of Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering courses, students can visit the website.

Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering admission:

faqs.question: How can I get into Dr. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Dr. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed in 2nd PUC / 12th Std / Equivalent Exam with English as one of the Languages and obtained in aggregate in Physics and Mathematics along with Chemistry / Bio-Technology / Biology / Electronics / Computer with the mentioned marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2024 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as ranks for different categories of students. During the last round, the Karnataka PGCET cutoff rank for admission to the MBA/PGDM course was 34799. For more details, refer to the table below:

Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering MBA/PGDM cutoff 2024 for the General AI quota candidates was 34799 in the final round. The cutoff data for the same course stood at 40926 in 2023, while in 2022, the cutoff rank stood at 21779. Analysing the cutoff data over three years, MBA/PGDM saw inconsistency in its last round cutoff for the General AI quota.
Some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET are tabulated below for Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering admission to the MBA/PGDM courses.

Dr. Sri. Sri. Sri. Shivakumara Mahaswamy College of Engineering accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET counselling PDFs.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 182775 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 200979, in the General All India quota.
